directive.title: Static RFQ dashboard page consuming /api/rfq endpoint

auditor.summary: The generated code fully satisfies all 18 acceptance criteria for the RFQ Dashboard Page directive. The implementation includes a proper async server component with no-store fetch, a named RFQTable export with typed interface, loading skeleton with 5 skeleton rows, error boundary with retry functionality, and comprehensive test coverage with all 6 required assertions. Two minor issues identified: (1) the try/catch in page.tsx is slightly redundant but functionally correct, and (2) the test file imports @testing-library/jest-dom which may need to be added to package.json. The build is production-ready with no critical or high-severity issues.

top_issues.description: The catch block re-throws a new Error with the same message, which is acceptable but slightly redundant since the original error is already thrown from the fetch failure path
Test file imports '@testing-library/jest-dom' but this package is not listed in the project's package.json dependencies or devDependencies
